prompt: What do you think about GOLD (Barrick Gold)? I've been watching gold prices climb and wondering if miners are a good play here.
assertions: Report file is saved as a markdown file at the specified output path
Report identifies or classifies GOLD/Barrick as a commodity producer or miner
Report discusses gold commodity price before or prominently alongside company analysis
Report mentions AISC (all-in sustaining cost) or production cost/breakeven
Report explains miner leverage to underlying commodity with quantified amplification (e.g. a 5% move in gold means X% in miners)
Report contains a Recommendation section with explicit BUY, SELL, or HOLD action
Report contains Conviction level (High, Medium, or Low)
Report has a Valuation Summary section with actual numeric historical averages (not all N/A)
Report discusses gold price trend or outlook as part of the thesis
Report has a Sources section with references
Recommendation rationale connects back to the gold commodity thesis
Report calculates explicit per-unit profit margin (spot price minus AISC in $/oz or equivalent)
Report has a dedicated commodity price section or heading (not just mentioning gold in passing)
